mapper.select: SELECT distinct TFB.ID, TFB.CNDN_ID, TFB.INVOICE_DETAIL_ID, TFB.PORT_CODE, TFB.PORT_NAME, TFB.MEA, TFB.NUMBER_COUNT2, TFB.UNIT_CODE, TFB.UNIT_NAME, TFB.RATE_ID, TFB.RATE_CODE, TBR.RATE_ITEM_NAME RATE_NAME, TFB.OLD_RATE, TFB.NEW_RATE, TFB.CARGO_TYPE_CODE, TFB.CARGO_CODE, TFB.TAX_RATE, TFB.REMARK, TFB.TAX_AMOUNT, TFB.PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, TFB.PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, TFB.BANK_ID, TFB.AMOUNT, TFB.CREATE_BY, TFB.CREATE_BY_NAME, TFB.CREATE_TIME, TFB.UPDATE_BY, TFB.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TFB.UPDATE_TIME, TFB.INVOICE_TYPE_CODE, MDD.DICT_LABEL CARGO_NAME, MFI.ITEM_TYPE_CD ITEM_TYPE_CD FROM T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL_DETAIL TFB LEFT JOIN M_DICT_DATA MDD ON (MDD.DICT_VALUE = TFB.CARGO_CODE and MDD.DICT_TYPE = 'CARGO_CATEGORY' ) LEFT JOIN T_BUS_RATE TBR ON TBR.ID = TFB.RATE_ID LEFT JOIN M_FEE_ITEM MFI ON TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = MFI.ITEM_CD WHERE CNDN_ID = #{id} ORDER BY ID DESC

SELECT ID, CNDN_ID, INVOICE_DETAIL_ID, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, MEA, UNIT_CODE,UNIT_NAME, RATE_CODE, RATE_NAME, OLD_RATE, NEW_RATE, CARGO_TYPE_CODE, CARGO_CODE, TAX_RATE, REMARK,TAX_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, BANK_ID, AMOUNT, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL_DETAIL
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL_DETAIL( ID, CNDN_ID, INVOICE_DETAIL_ID, PORT_CODE, PORT_NAME, MEA, UNIT_CODE, UNIT_NAME, RATE_CODE, RATE_NAME, OLD_RATE, NEW_RATE, CARGO_TYPE_CODE, CARGO_CODE, TAX_RATE, TAX_AMOUNT, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME, BANK_ID, AMOUNT, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cndnId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{invoiceDetailId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{portName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mea, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{unitName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rateName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{oldRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{newRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cargoTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cargoCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taxRate, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{taxAmount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{paymentMethodCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paymentMethodName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{amount, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_CREDIT_DEBIT_BILL_DETAIL SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CNDN_ID = #{cndnId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INVOICE_DETAIL_ID = #{invoiceDetailId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PORT_CODE = #{portCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PORT_NAME = #{portName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MEA = #{mea,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_CODE = #{unitCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_NAME = #{unitName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_CODE = #{rateCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RATE_NAME = #{rateName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OLD_RATE = #{oldRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, NEW_RATE = #{newRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, CARGO_TYPE_CODE = #{cargoTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CARGO_CODE = #{cargoCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TAX_RATE = #{taxRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, TAX_AMOUNT = #{taxAmount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, PAYMENT_METHOD_CODE = #{paymentMethodCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PAYMENT_METHOD_NAME = #{paymentMethodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_ID = #{bankId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, AMOUNT = #{amount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, REMARK = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
mapper.select: select ITEM_TYPE_CD FROM M_FEE_ITEM MFI LEFT JOIN T_BUS_RATE TBR ON TBR.RATE_ITEM_CODE = MFI.ITEM_CD WHERE TBR.ID = #{rateId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY ITEM_TYPE_CD
